name: umbra
description: Ambition, Shadows, and Decay. The architecture of the Obsidian Throne.

templates.name: Obsidian Archway
templates.description: A jagged arch of solid obsidian. Dark banners of tattered silk flutter in a cold, phantom wind.

templates.name: Shadow-Cloaked Alley
templates.description: A narrow passageway between dark buildings. The shadows here seem to have a weight and a voice of their own.

templates.name: Altar of Whispering Souls
templates.description: A dark platform surrounded by floating, flickering soul-lanterns. Those who kneel here hear the ambitious whispers of the void.

templates.name: Dread Spire of Nox
templates.description: A massive, spiraling tower that seems to drink the very light from the sky. It is the seat of the Obsidian Throne.

templates.name: The Velvet Grift
templates.description: A dimly lit shop where the air is thick with purple smoke. Exotic toxins, shadow-cloaks, and stolen secrets are the primary currency here.

templates.name: The Pit of Ambition
templates.description: A sunken pit surrounded by jagged obsidian teeth. The sand is stained dark by those whose ambition exceeded their reach.

templates.name: The Noxian Repository
templates.description: Shelves of black glass contain glowing soul-jars and scrolls written in shadow-ink. It feels as if the knowledge here is watching you back.

templates.name: Shadow Tenements
templates.description: Cramped stone dwellings built into the walls of the ravine. Each window is a single, glowing purple eye in the darkness.

templates.name: Noxian Cathedral
templates.description: A magnificent cathedral of dark glass and pulsing void-crystals. Here, the ambitious pray to Nox for the power to seize their destiny.
